samples.text: A person can be a parent and also a child of someone else. Is this logically consistent?
Someone can be a parent while also being another person's child. Does this make logical sense?
An individual can be a parent and simultaneously someone's offspring. Is this logically consistent?
Being a parent and being a child refer to different relationships. Both can hold at once. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A person can be a parent and also a child of someone else. A blue car is parked outside. Is this logically consistent?
